stemHtml: An aircraft call sign can be abbreviated after satisfactory communication has been established, no confusion is likely to arise, and...

options.a: after the abbreviated call sign has been used by the ground station.
options.b: if the aircraft station deems it necessary to call the ground station with its abbreviated call sign.
options.c: if there are a lot of other communications on the frequency.
options.d: after the aircraft station and ground station agree to use the abbreviated call sign.
